args.body: Standard notation re: T-358. On the date in question, Penny Cho checked out a projector under a coworker's name to expedite setup. The coworker confirmed agreement after the fact, but the asset log was inaccurate for approximately one day until corrected. Issue is minor and self-limiting; recording as a standard notation. Expectation going forward: equipment must be checked out under the actual user's name at the time of checkout, regardless of time pressure. No further action required; panel review not warranted given scope and impact.
